$comment: C11/C23 6.4.3 + 6.4.5 surrogate-pair witness: u"\U0001F600" (😀, U+1F600) under char16_t encodes as the UTF-16 surrogate pair high 0xD83D + low 0xDE00 (LE bytes 3D D8 00 DE), then the wide NUL. p[0]==0xD83D && p[1]==0xDE00 && p[2]==0 ? 42 : 1. Red-on-disable: revert the encodeCodepoint U16 astral branch and this fails to compile. Runs on all 4 targets + the release arm.
